modules.name: REPOMIND_CONFIG
modules.summary: Defines project configuration for RepoMind AI, changelog, bot, and tickets.

modules.name: README
modules.summary: Provides project overview, setup instructions, and deployment guide for Next.js app.

modules.name: TSCONFIG
modules.summary: Configures TypeScript compiler options for a Next.js project, including paths.

modules.name: REPOMIND_ARCHITECTURE_TECH_STACK
modules.summary: Placeholder for detected project tech stack, languages, frameworks, and services.

modules.name: REPOMIND_ARCHITECTURE_ONBOARDING
modules.summary: Placeholder for project onboarding guide, to be filled by RepoMind.

modules.name: SRC_APP_LAYOUT
modules.summary: Defines the root HTML layout for the Next.js application with fonts.

modules.name: ESLINT_CONFIG
modules.summary: Configures ESLint for Next.js and TypeScript projects.

modules.name: POSTCSS_CONFIG
modules.summary: Configures PostCSS with Tailwind CSS plugin.

modules.name: SRC_APP_PAGE
modules.summary: Renders the main home page with Next.js logo and links.

modules.name: REPAMIND_ARCHITECTURE_MODULES
modules.summary: Placeholder for Repomind module architecture data.

modules.name: REPAMIND_META_TICKET_INDEX
modules.summary: Stores Repomind ticket and ADR index metadata.

modules.name: PACKAGE
modules.summary: Defines project metadata, scripts, and dependencies.
